case_title: MICHAEL STRADER VS. 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT SENT TO PLTF, RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,834.00 FILED BY STRADER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
2ND POS FILED, SERVED ON DIFFRENT DATE,NOT ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM"POS OM FILE...".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRADER, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,850.00, COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFNDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS SET FOR MAR-18-2008 IS CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO APR-22-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NOTICE SENT TO MICHAEL STRADER WAS RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE AS INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY 50 GOLDEN GATE APTS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PER THE COURT'S REQUEST, CLERK CONTACTED THE PLAINTIFF MICHAEL STRADER TO VERIFY HIS ADDRESS, AS ALL MAIL WAS RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE AS INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS. ADDRESS INFORMATION HAS BEEN UPDATED TO ADD APT NO. 25. PLAINTIF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2008 - JUDGMENT.
